displayText.headline: From Restless Nights to Restorative Calm.
displayText.subheading: Meet the Aura Ring. Your bridge to aligned wellness.

style: commercial product photography minimalist modern linear gradient float glow effects
description: An elegant representation of the Linear Gradient Float layout. The background features a smooth, deep obsidian-to-midnight-indigo linear gradient, illuminated by a soft, ethereal violet glow radiating from the center. The product, a sleek and reflective metallic ring, is suspended weightlessly mid-air at a dynamic 45-degree angle, casting a faint, soft-focused shadow onto a semi-translucent glass shelf below. Subtle, out-of-focus light particles drift gracefully around the product to emphasize the weightless, transformative theme of going from chaotic energy to absolute peace.
